items.description: Research common vulnerabilities identified during the vulnerability scanning phase, including their definitions and examples.
Identify and summarize popular tools used for vulnerability scanning, including their features and use cases.
Investigate methodologies employed in vulnerability scanning, such as OWASP, NIST, and others, detailing their frameworks and processes.
Compile findings into a structured report format, including sections for common vulnerabilities, tools, and methodologies.
